official_name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
notes: NIST operates the National Vulnerability Database (NVD), the US government repository of vulnerability data based on CVE records. NVD enriches CVE data with CVSS scores, CPE matching, and CWE classification.

data.description: US government repository of vulnerability data. Enriches CVE records with CVSS scores, CPE platform matching, and CWE classification.
data.notes: NVD is the authoritative US government source for vulnerability severity scores. Provides both web UI and REST API (v2.0). Bulk data feeds available. NVD has experienced processing delays since 2024 — some CVEs take weeks to get NVD enrichment.

examples.note: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset — mass exploitation of web servers
